summary.practicalNextVideoTarget: about 28 polished video definitions before considering a larger library

candidates.stateAfter: policy frame established; persistence claim limited unless J10 handlers are added
candidates.evidenceCreated: none proven beyond generic audit unless J10 handlers are added
candidates.auditEvent: generic audit fallback or future j10 policy/security audit
candidates.clientVisibilityImpact: defines future gates but creates no client advice
candidates.reasonToInclude: Sets the no-unapproved-advice policy frame.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Do not claim persisted policy/security updates until handlers exist.
candidates.relationToExistingJ01J10: Retains J10, with lowered proof label.

blockedActions: active client workspace before setup gates
candidates.currentImplementationMaturity: E5 demo transaction for J06 actions, UI may remain static
candidates.reasonToInclude: Shows tenant readiness before client work begins.

candidates.stateAfter: identity, consent and role acknowledgement complete in demo terms

candidates.clientVisibilityImpact: enables safe scoped access, not advice
candidates.currentImplementationMaturity: E3 route coverage; undercovered by current screencasts

candidates.reasonToInclude: Closes the biggest userflow coverage gap.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Do not present as real auth.

candidates.stateAfter: profile, document metadata and verification review created in demo transaction paths

candidates.stateAfter: entity/action readiness or blocked evidence state recorded
candidates.clientVisibilityImpact: structure visible by scope; no advice release
candidates.currentImplementationMaturity: E5 demo transaction for J05, static UI caveat
candidates.reasonToInclude: Makes wealth structure tangible without pretending it is advice.

candidates.stateAfter: request data / route to advisor path selected
candidates.reasonToInclude: Proves signal is not advice and can request data.
Core product rule: advisor approval is not enough.

candidates.stateBefore: advisor approved, evidence validated, permission allowed
candidates.clientVisibilityImpact: creates client visibility only after gate

candidates.clientVisibilityImpact: client sees released decision and proof

candidates.stateAfter: approved redacted metadata-only package, download/share audited

candidates.auditEvent: invite, role change, approve access, audit export

candidates.currentImplementationMaturity: E3/E5 mixed; detail has J03 audit path, index route missing from videos

candidates.stateBefore: client has next steps and blocked recommendation

candidates.clientVisibilityImpact: client sees simplified released communication only

candidates.stateBefore: signal, decision or action requires human escalation

candidates.reasonToInclude: Covers missing PF-J in an ops/investor appendix.

blockedActions: treating reference pages as client journeys

candidates.stateBefore: MVP and future scope mixed in stakeholder questions

candidates.reasonToInclude: Prevents overclaim by separating shipped demo reality from roadmap.

blockedActions: ambiguous state labels in demo narration
candidates.screencastNeed: P1 appendix / no video by default
candidates.reasonToInclude: Makes captions, notes and trust labels consistent.

candidates.stateAfter: readiness issue triaged with safe status
candidates.evidenceCreated: data-quality evidence if action is persisted
candidates.auditEvent: data quality review audit if implemented
candidates.clientVisibilityImpact: client sees safe request/status, not internal risk scoring
candidates.screencastNeed: P1 if diligence asks about data quality

candidates.evidenceCreated: upload metadata proof for valid files
candidates.reasonToInclude: Backs the document intake demo with file realism.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Not visually rich enough for primary demo.

candidates.stateAfter: metadata package manifest available and audited
candidates.reasonToInclude: Clarifies what export proof actually is today.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Not a real file-storage proof.

candidates.evidenceCreated: policy change evidence needed for persistence claim
candidates.clientVisibilityImpact: affects future gates, not current client advice
candidates.reasonToInclude: Explains multi-tenant governance depth.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Weak unless policy mutation proof is explicit.

candidates.evidenceCreated: role-change evidence if action is persisted
candidates.currentImplementationMaturity: E5 for J07 actions, E3 for platform role surfaces
candidates.screencastNeed: P1 appendix or P2 negative clip
candidates.reasonToInclude: Governance proof is stronger when role changes require friction.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Can be test evidence unless asked live.

candidates.stateAfter: controlled audit export requested or denied
candidates.currentImplementationMaturity: E3/E5 mixed; access audit exists, export control needs explicit path
candidates.screencastNeed: P1 if diligence asks for audit portability
candidates.reasonToInclude: Audit proof should itself be governed.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Avoid claiming complete audit-export product without handler proof.

blockedActions: restricted evidence download by wrong role
candidates.currentImplementationMaturity: E5 for J03 evidence detail path, E3 for index

candidates.stateAfter: denied, no mutation except denied audit
candidates.reasonToInclude: Proves release authority boundary.
candidates.reasonToExclude: May be better as test proof than video.

candidates.reasonToInclude: Tenant isolation is a high-stakes proof.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Not needed in fast live demo.
candidates.relationToExistingJ01J10: Negative proof across all tenant-scoped journeys.

candidates.stateBefore: restricted export requested by forbidden role
candidates.reasonToInclude: Strengthens export story with denial path.

candidates.stateAfter: file blocked before evidence or extraction

candidates.screencastNeed: P2 promote to video for ethics proof

candidates.currentImplementationMaturity: E5 metadata tests and J08 handlers for success path; negative video needs explicit fixture
candidates.reasonToInclude: Balances export success with blocked path.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Needs explicit negative fixture/action before video claim.

candidates.stateBefore: internal-only evidence requested by non-internal role
candidates.reasonToInclude: Proves internal-only evidence boundary.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Usually stronger as QA proof than video.

candidates.stateAfter: human review required; extraction remains draft
blockedActions: AI extraction marked final without review
candidates.evidenceCreated: review evidence only after human action
candidates.clientVisibilityImpact: client sees pending/needs review status only

candidates.clientVisibilityImpact: client sees safe scheduling context only
candidates.reasonToInclude: Connects human review with communication workflow.
candidates.reasonToExclude: No dedicated communication mutation proof yet.

candidates.clientVisibilityImpact: client choice recorded; no advice forced

candidates.reasonToExclude: Not needed in short live story.

candidates.currentImplementationMaturity: E4/E5 metadata proof; explicit expiry fixture needed

candidates.reasonToExclude: Needs explicit expiry fixture before video.

candidates.stateBefore: access request pending or role active

candidates.screencastNeed: P2/P1 if governance diligence is high

candidates.reasonToExclude: Can be a QA proof unless asked live.

candidates.reasonToInclude: Shows onboarding has real stop states.

candidates.stateAfter: exception documented, blocked or routed for more evidence

candidates.stateBefore: action is not ready or blocked by missing evidence

candidates.stateBefore: action ready toggle attempted without evidence
candidates.stateAfter: mark-ready blocked and evidence request generated

candidates.clientVisibilityImpact: prevents confusing or unsafe demo states
candidates.reasonToInclude: Polish failures can damage a live demo even if core workflow works.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Better as QA evidence than narrated screencast.

blockedActions: treating route coverage as workflow execution
candidates.reasonToInclude: Exhaustive route proof belongs in automation.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Not a presentation video.

sourceRoutes: route x state x role matrix
candidates.stateBefore: routes, roles and states are tracked separately
candidates.stateAfter: matrix identifies demo-safe, blocked and missing states
blockedActions: claiming route coverage as workflow coverage
candidates.reasonToInclude: Prevents blind spots when routes share screens but differ by state/role.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Too matrix-heavy for a demo narrative.
candidates.relationToExistingJ01J10: Covers journey coverage gaps around all current recordings.

candidates.stateAfter: denial cases documented by role, tenant and object type
candidates.currentImplementationMaturity: E5 test proof for top denial cases
candidates.screencastNeed: no video unless a high-stakes denial is promoted to P2
candidates.reasonToInclude: Permission denials are the strongest safety counter-claims.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Most denial permutations should stay automated.

candidates.stateBefore: important actions create scattered evidence/audit records
candidates.stateAfter: object lifecycle mapped from action to evidence to audit to export
blockedActions: claiming evidence exists without object proof
candidates.clientVisibilityImpact: documents what can safely be shown to clients
candidates.reasonToInclude: Separates proof objects from screen narration.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Better consumed as a table than a video.

candidates.stateBefore: demo routes render with visual contract expectations
candidates.stateAfter: screenshots/contract results prove non-blank, clean UI, no spec chrome
blockedActions: shipping misleading spec panels or broken visual states
candidates.reasonToInclude: A demo can fail if visuals drift even when workflow logic is sound.
candidates.reasonToExclude: Use as QA gate, not story content.
